description_long: This is a detached residential house set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and surrounded by dense, mature trees and shrubs. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a light-colored facade, likely painted in white or light gray. The front of the house has a central entryway with a small porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a short set of steps leading up from the sidewalk. The property is bordered by a paved road at the front, and the landscaping includes a mix of deciduous and possibly flowering trees, providing privacy and curb appeal. The windows are arranged in a balanced, orderly fashion, contributing to a classic suburban appearance. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented home typical of North American neighborhoods.
description: A classic suburban house with a gable roof, light facade, central porch, and lush landscaping, set beside a paved road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway, porch, symmetrical windows, and the house framed by trees with the road in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the dense tree coverage at the rear and side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the roofline and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the side elevation, more trees, and the road running along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and flanking windows, accented by simple columns and an overhanging roof.
